mapper.select: SELECT tpi.GRP_IDX as grp_idx, tpi.GRP_NM as grp_nm, tpi.PUMP_NM as pump_nm, tpi.PUMP_IDX as pump_idx, m.MOTOR_ID as motor_id, DATE_FORMAT(m.ACQ_DATE , '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as acq_date, m.DE_rms_amp as motor_de_rms_amp, m.NDE_rms_amp as motor_nde_rms_amp, p.DE_rms_amp as pump_de_rms_amp, p.NDE_rms_amp as pump_nde_rms_amp FROM TB_AI_DIAG_MOTOR as m JOIN TB_AI_DIAG_PUMP as p ON m.MOTOR_ID = p.PUMP_ID AND DATE_FORMAT(m.ACQ_DATE , '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') = DATE_FORMAT(p.ACQ_DATE , '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') JOIN TB_PUMP_INF as tpi ON p.PUMP_ID = tpi.MOTOR_ID and m.MOTOR_ID = tpi.MOTOR_ID AND m.ACQ_DATE = (SELECT MAX(ACQ_DATE) FROM TB_AI_DIAG_MOTOR WHERE MOTOR_ID IN ( SELECT MOTOR_ID FROM TB_PUMP_INF WHERE GRP_IDX = #{grp_idx} GROUP BY CENTER_ID) ) WHERE tpi.GRP_IDX = #{grp_idx} ORDER BY m.ACQ_DATE DESC, PUMP_IDX

SELECT tpi.GRP_IDX as grp_idx, tpi.GRP_NM as grp_nm, tpi.PUMP_IDX as pump_idx, tps.PUMP_SCADA_ID as pump_scada_id, tps.BRG_MOTOR_DE_TEMP as brg_motor_de_temp, tps.BRG_MOTOR_NDE_TEMP as brg_motor_nde_temp, tps.BRG_PUMP_DE_TEMP as brg_pump_de_temp, tps.BRG_PUMP_NDE_TEMP as brg_pump_nde_temp, DATE_FORMAT(tps.ACQ_DATE , '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as acq_date FROM TB_PUMP_SCADA as tps JOIN TB_PUMP_INF as tpi ON tpi.PUMP_SCADA_ID = tps.PUMP_SCADA_ID WHERE ACQ_DATE = ( SELECT ACQ_DATE FROM TB_PUMP_SCADA WHERE ACQ_DATE >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE) AND PUMP_SCADA_ID in (SELECT PUMP_SCADA_ID FROM TB_PUMP_INF WHERE GRP_IDX= #{grp_idx}) GROUP BY ACQ_DATE ORDER BY ACQ_DATE DESC LIMIT 0, 1) AND tpi.GRP_IDX = #{grp_idx} order by PUMP_IDX

select pmi.GRP_IDX as 'grp_idx', pmi.GRP_NM as 'grp_nm', pmi.PUMP_IDX as 'pump_idx', psc.PUMP_SCADA_ID as 'pump_scada_id', DATE_FORMAT(psc.ACQ_DATE , '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as acq_date, psc.BRG_MOTOR_DE_TEMP as 'M_DE_bearing_temp', psc.BRG_MOTOR_NDE_TEMP as 'M_NDE_bearing_temp' , psc.BRG_PUMP_DE_TEMP as 'P_DE_bearing_temp', psc.BRG_PUMP_NDE_TEMP as 'P_NDE_bearing_temp' from TB_PUMP_INF pmi, TB_PUMP_SCADA psc WHERE pmi.PUMP_SCADA_ID = psc.PUMP_SCADA_ID and DATE_FORMAT(psc.ACQ_DATE, '%i') in ('00' , '30') and psc.ACQ_DATE = (SELECT MAX(ACQ_DATE) FROM TB_PUMP_SCADA WHERE ACQ_DATE >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE)) and pmi.GRP_IDX = #{grp_idx} GROUP BY psc.ACQ_DATE order by pmi.PUMP_IDX ASC

SELECT tpi.grp_idx, tpi.grp_nm, tpi.pump_idx, m.motor_id as motor_id, CASE WHEN m.unbalance_alarm = 1 OR m.misalignment_alarm = 1 OR m.rotor_alarm = 1 OR m.de_bpfo_alarm = 1 OR m.DE_BPFI_alarm = 1 OR m.DE_BSF_alarm = 1 OR m.DE_FTF_alarm = 1 OR m.NDE_BPFO_alarm = 1 OR m.NDE_BPFI_alarm = 1 OR m.NDE_BSF_alarm = 1 OR m.NDE_FTF_alarm = 1 OR m.DE_RMS_ALARM = 1 OR m.NDE_RMS_ALARM = 1 OR p.impeller_alarm = 1 OR p.cavitation_alarm = 1 OR p.de_bpfo_alarm = 1 OR p.DE_BPFI_alarm = 1 OR p.DE_BSF_alarm = 1 OR p.DE_FTF_alarm = 1 OR p.NDE_BPFO_alarm = 1 OR p.NDE_BPFI_alarm = 1 OR p.NDE_BSF_alarm = 1 OR p.NDE_FTF_alarm = 1 THEN 'True' ELSE 'False' END AS Alarm, m.unbalance_alarm as 'm_unbalance_alarm', m.misalignment_alarm as 'm_misalignment_alarm', m.rotor_alarm as 'm_rotor_alarm', m.de_bpfo_alarm as 'm_de_bpfo_alarm', m.DE_BPFI_alarm as 'm_de_bpfi_alarm', m.DE_BSF_alarm as 'm_de_bsf_alarm', m.DE_FTF_alarm as 'm_de_ftf_alarm', m.NDE_BPFO_alarm as 'm_nde_BPFO_alarm', m.NDE_BPFI_alarm as 'm_nde_bpfi_alarm', m.NDE_BSF_alarm as 'm_nde_bsfbsf_alarm', m.NDE_FTF_alarm as 'm_nde_ftf_alarm', m.DE_RMS_ALARM as 'm_de_rms_alarm', m.NDE_RMS_ALARM as 'm_nde_rms_alarm', p.impeller_alarm as 'p_impeller_alarm', p.cavitation_alarm as 'p_cavitation_alarm', p.de_bpfo_alarm as 'p_de_bpfo_alarm', p.DE_BPFI_alarm as 'p_de_bpfi_alarm', p.DE_BSF_alarm as 'p_de_bsf_alarm', p.DE_FTF_alarm as 'p_de_ftf_alarm', p.NDE_BPFO_alarm as 'p_nde_BPFO_alarm', p.NDE_BPFI_alarm as 'p_nde_bpfi_alarm', p.NDE_BSF_alarm as 'p_nde_bsf_alarm', p.NDE_FTF_alarm as 'p_nde_ftf_alarm', p.DE_RMS_ALARM as 'p_de_rms_alarm', p.NDE_RMS_ALARM as 'p_m_nde_rms_alarm', CASE WHEN m.de_bpfo_alarm = 1 OR m.DE_BPFI_alarm = 1 OR m.DE_BSF_alarm = 1 OR m.DE_FTF_alarm = 1 THEN 'True' ELSE 'False' END as 'm_de_bp_alarm', CASE WHEN m.NDE_BPFO_alarm = 1 OR m.NDE_BPFI_alarm = 1 OR m.NDE_BSF_alarm = 1 OR m.NDE_FTF_alarm = 1 THEN 'True' ELSE 'False' END as 'm_nde_bp_alarm', CASE WHEN p.de_bpfo_alarm = 1 OR p.DE_BPFI_alarm = 1 OR p.DE_BSF_alarm = 1 OR p.DE_FTF_alarm = 1 THEN 'True' ELSE 'False' END as 'p_de_bp_alarm', CASE WHEN p.NDE_BPFO_alarm = 1 OR p.NDE_BPFI_alarm = 1 OR p.NDE_BSF_alarm = 1 OR p.NDE_FTF_alarm = 1 THEN 'True' ELSE 'False' END as 'p_nde_bp_alarm' FROM TB_AI_DIAG_MOTOR as m LEFT JOIN TB_AI_DIAG_PUMP as p ON m.motor_id = p.PUMP_ID AND m.ACQ_DATE = p.ACQ_DATE JOIN TB_PUMP_INF as tpi ON tpi.motor_id = p.PUMP_ID AND tpi.motor_id = m.motor_id WHERE m.ACQ_DATE = ( SELECT ACQ_DATE FROM TB_AI_DIAG_MOTOR WHERE ACQ_DATE <= NOW() AND ACQ_DATE >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 60 MINUTE) AND MOTOR_ID IN (SELECT MOTOR_ID FROM TB_PUMP_INF WHERE GRP_IDX= #{grp_idx}) GROUP BY ACQ_DATE ORDER BY ACQ_DATE DESC LIMIT 0, 1 ) AND tpi.grp_idx = #{grp_idx} ORDER BY m.ACQ_DATE DESC, pump_idx;

SELECT grp_idx, grp_nm, motor_id, PUMP_IDX as pump_idx, PUMP_NM as pump_nm, pump_scada_id, MOTOR_NDE_AMP_TAG, MOTOR_DE_AMP_TAG, PUMP_NDE_AMP_TAG, PUMP_DE_AMP_TAG, MOTOR_ALARM_TAG, PUMP_ALARM_TAG FROM TB_PUMP_INF group by grp_idx order by grp_idx

SELECT grp_idx, grp_nm, motor_id, PUMP_IDX as pump_idx, pump_scada_id, MOTOR_NDE_AMP_TAG, MOTOR_DE_AMP_TAG, PUMP_NDE_AMP_TAG, PUMP_DE_AMP_TAG, MOTOR_ALARM_TAG, PUMP_ALARM_TAG FROM TB_PUMP_INF order by grp_idx, PUMP_IDX

select IFNULL(SUM(total_alarm_sum),0) as 'total_alarm_sum' from (SELECT tpi.PUMP_NM, tpi.grp_idx, tpi.PUMP_IDX, tpi.sensor_count, CASE WHEN SUM( IF(tadm.unbalance_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadm.misalignment_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadm.rotor_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadm.de_bpfo_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadm.DE_BPFI_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadm.DE_BSF_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadm.DE_FTF_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadm.NDE_BPFO_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadm.NDE_BPFI_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadm.NDE_BSF_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadm.NDE_FTF_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadm.DE_rms_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadm.NDE_rms_alarm = 1, 1, 0) ) > 0 THEN 2 ELSE 0 END AS total_alarm_sum FROM TB_AI_DIAG_MOTOR tadm
JOIN TB_PUMP_INF tpi ON tadm.motor_id = tpi.MOTOR_ID WHERE tadm.ACQ_DATE >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND tadm.ACQ_DATE <= CONCAT(CURDATE(), ' 23:59:59')
GROUP BY tpi.grp_idx, tpi.PUMP_IDX) a

select IFNULL(SUM(total_alarm_sum),0) as 'total_alarm_sum' from ( SELECT tpi.PUMP_NM, tpi.grp_idx, tpi.PUMP_IDX, tpi.sensor_count, CASE WHEN SUM( IF(tadp.impeller_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadp.cavitation_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadp.DE_bpfo_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadp.DE_BPFI_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadp.DE_BSF_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadp.DE_FTF_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadp.NDE_BPFO_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadp.NDE_BPFI_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadp.NDE_BSF_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadp.NDE_FTF_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadp.DE_rms_alarm = 1, 1, 0) + IF(tadp.NDE_rms_alarm = 1, 1, 0) ) > 0 THEN 2 ELSE 0 END AS total_alarm_sum FROM TB_AI_DIAG_PUMP tadp JOIN TB_PUMP_INF tpi ON tadp.PUMP_ID = tpi.MOTOR_ID WHERE tadp.ACQ_DATE >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND tadp.ACQ_DATE <= CONCAT(CURDATE(), ' 23:59:59') GROUP BY tpi.grp_idx, tpi.PUMP_IDX ) a
